subject: Social Studies
style: Uganda flag-inspired classroom infographic; exact SVG text overlay; no generated text inside raster image.
title: Living Together in Africa
details: There are 7 continents in the world.
evidence_excerpts: Connecting personal knowledge of local location to the global context of Africa. The learner appreciates Africa as a continent and its position on the world map. We live in Uganda.; Uganda is a country in East Africa.; Africa is a large continent on the Earth.

Introduction to the seven continents and Africa's rank as the second-largest. The learner identifies the continents of the world and their sizes. There are 7 continents in the world.; Asia is the largest.; Africa is the second-largest continent.

Identifying the major oceans (Atlantic, Indian, Arctic, Pacific) and the seas (Mediterranean, Red Sea) surrounding Africa. The learner names the water bodies that surround Africa. West: Atlantic Ocean.; East: Indian Ocean and Red Sea.; North: Mediterranean Sea.
